ideas.title: MOONSHOT: Cmd-K command palette that drives the whole site — jump to posts, toggle theme, run blog-logic fns, query vitals
ideas.why: code_commits_7d=150 and a growing ~/factory surface mean navigation is sprawling, and a fuzzy command palette is the single highest-leverage UX feature for a dense static app.

ideas.title: MOONSHOT: live 3D cluster sculpture — the two Sparks + GPUs as a breathing WebGL scene driven by real load/temp/mem
ideas.why: the signals already stream per-node load, GPU util/temp/power and mem_used for spark-1/spark-2, so binding that live vitals JSON to a rotating WebGL sculpture turns the factory tab into a status display you feel rather than read.

ideas.title: MOONSHOT: in-browser theming engine — live HSL/skin editor that repaints the site via CSS custom properties and shareable URL
ideas.why: the site already ships a tight hand-authored palette and a CSP, so exposing themeable CSS variables with a live editor is a big new capability that stays fully client-side and reversible per-visitor.

ideas.title: MOONSHOT: 'Idle Foundry' — GPU-generative art gallery rendered on-demand by the two idle GB10 Sparks
ideas.why: spark GPUs report util=0 / temp~45C / power~10W meaning both DGX GB10s sit fully idle, so a visitor-triggered diffusion/shader render that puts that silicon to work is a whoa-factor showpiece grounded in real telemetry.

ideas.title: wind_dir_compass() pure fn — degrees → 16-point compass (N, NNE, …) + emoji arrow
ideas.why: coverage_fns=9 are all astronomy math and wx.json already carries a wind bearing that the site renders as a bare number, so a fully-testable deg→compass mapper is a natural extension of the 100%-gated crate.

ideas.title: router_mix_ratio() pure fn — spark/cloud_hard counts → 'X% on-prem this week' badge
ideas.why: the signals already expose router.spark=42 / cloud_hard=36 but the factory tab shows raw counts, so a tiny pure ratio+label fn turns provenance data the system already tracks into a legible on-prem-vs-cloud stat.
